    US 02.06.02 As an organizer I want to see a list of all the cancelled entrants.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Provides details for events, such as the eventID, waitlists Allows user to join wait list and leave waitlist Displays comments
    EventHistory
    Shows users history of events they have interacted in Allows user to view details of events they have interacted in Accessed from profile
    EventSearchActivity
    Activity for searching and filtering public events Implements: US 01.01.04: Search by keyword US 01.01.05: Search by tag/category US 01.01.06: Search by date/capacity range

    Instrumented test, which will execute on an Android device.
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
    GuidelinesActivity
    displays guidelines for a lottery user stories implemented: - US 01.05.05: Entrant wants to know the criteria or guidelines for the lottery selection process.
    InvitationsActivity
    Provides logic for invitations to an event, including accepting/declining an invite.
    MainActivity
    Main activity for the app.
    NotificationUnitTest
    Local unit tests for notification opt-out logic.
    OrganizerNotificationsUnitTest
    Local unit tests for organizer notifications.
    OrganizerStartScreen
    Home screen for organizer - create events - view entrants - view my events - edit events - View map - send notifications - View event QR code
    OrganizerUnitTest
    Unit tests for Organizer functionality.
    OrganizerUnitTest.CreatePublicEventAndQRCodeTests
    UnitTests to test US 02.01.01 - testing creating an event - testing QR code generation

    UnitTests to test US 02.02.02 and 02.02.03
    OrganizerUnitTest.PosterTests
    UnitTests to test US 02.04.01 and 02.04.02

    UnitTests to test US 02.05.02
    PrivateEventUnitTest
    Local unit tests for private event, notification, and invitation logic.
    ProfileActivity
    creates a profile for a user
    ProfileActivityTest
    unit tests related to ProfileActivity logic tests run locally and verify user creation
    QRandPrivateinviteUnitTest
    Local unit tests for QR code scanning and private invite accept/decline logic.
    QRScanActivity
    US 01.06.01 Entrant wants to be able to view event details by scanning a QR code.
    SearchUnitTest
    Unit tests for event search/filtering
    SettingsActivity
    Settings activity for the app Allows the user to change the language of the app Options: English (default), french, russian
    UserHomeActivity
    Home page for the entrant/user.
    UserNotificationsActivity
    Displays all in-app notifications for the current user.
    UserUnitTest
    unit tests related to UserHomeActivity logic tests
